creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

We already have an updated version of www/falkon in our test repo where the "qtonly" flavor is for Qt6, "default" for KF6, and Qt5 support is totally removed [1]. I realize it's taking us a while to land these updated ports, but please bear with us. If you would like to try them out, you could use this branch as an overlay. We could always use more testers to help make this process go quicker.

All of us who are actively working on this hang out in #freebsd-desktop on Libera.Chat [2] if you need help with or want to give feedback on the Qt6/KF6-based KDE Applications currently in testing.

I appreciate your creative effort, but we simply can't have flavors using multiple different versions of the same software in the ports tree.

[1] https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports-kde/tree/kde-it_goes_to_6
[2] https://wiki.freebsd.org/IRC/Channels
